description: Machine-readable source of truth for the Glenmoor terrain batch workflow.

promptBlocks.globalPositive: painterly isometric tactical RPG terrain art, isolated asset render, readable gameplay silhouette, restrained medieval-fantasy material rendering, muted natural palette, clean value grouping, plain neutral backdrop, no modern elements, no text, no UI
promptBlocks.globalNegative: full background scene, photoreal landscape, perspective camera shot, oversized props, busy clutter outside the tile footprint, multiple tiles, abstract smear, text, watermark, border, logo, character silhouette
promptBlocks.blockDirective: single isolated isometric terrain tile block, readable top diamond and short side face, centered composition on a plain backdrop, no surrounding map, no extra tiles, no abstract shapes
promptBlocks.overlayDirective: single isolated terrain overlay asset for one tactical tile, centered composition on a plain backdrop, readable when layered above a terrain block without hiding unit feet, no surrounding environment

variants.descriptor: olive turf with subtle damp tufts and smooth worn edges
mud-broken grass with darker hoof-worn patches
rough grass with sparse stone flecks and slightly cooler moss tones
packed dirt lane with shallow cart-rut wear
stony road with compacted mud and pale dust edge
cool brown road surface with stronger travel-line readability

overlay.descriptor: road-rut overlay with subtle track wear and muddy edge breakup

variants.descriptor: mossy forest floor with root hints and damp soil
brushy woodland floor with muted leaf scatter
dark forest ground with sparse fern accents and cool shadow tone

overlay.descriptor: forest canopy and brush overlay with readable negative space for unit silhouettes

variants.descriptor: dark still water with soft ring ripples
cold slate water with faint current lines
shallow edge water with muted algae tint and gentle breakup

overlay.descriptor: water ripple overlay with soft circular current accents

variants.descriptor: weathered flagstone with light seam cracking
masonry slab with chipped edges and subtle grout lines
fortified stone surface with cooler slate value grouping
straight weathered timber crossing with clean plank direction
bridge endcap with edge trim and anchoring posts
damaged bridge segment with controlled missing-plank read
reinforced timber crossing with iron banding and sturdier trim

overlay.descriptor: bridge plank overlay with clearer grain direction and board seams

variants.descriptor: fractured ruin ground with broken masonry chips
collapsed stone tile with dusty rubble scatter
ancient ruin block with cooler cracked slab pattern

overlay.descriptor: ruins debris overlay with broken fragments kept outside the tile center
